prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3552名→2836名→2730名→2980名→2936名，整体在2700–3600名区间波动；2022–2023年位次有所前移（竞争加剧），2024–2025年略有后移；2025年基准位次约2936名，近两年趋于稳定；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为80人，2024–2025年缩减至75人；2026年计划仍为75人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，计划因素对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，中央军委直属的综合性军事院校，被誉为"军中清华"，在国防科技领域具有不可替代的地位；软科中国大学排名未收录军校数据，但学校综合实力与顶尖985高校相当；该校为军事院校，未纳入常规声誉监测与抖音热度排名体系；近年未见明显投档断档或负面舆情记录，报考热度主要受军校特殊性质及国防科技行业前景驱动；系统科学、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息与通信工程、航空宇航科学与技术、管理科学与工程等学科实力突出（第五轮学科评估数据未公开，以上为公开信息）；招生专业覆盖计算机类、电子信息类、航空航天类、自动化类等核心工科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热（2024–2026年均为高热推荐），自动化类（含人工智能、机器人）热度偏热，航空航天类关注度较高；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年约32.0万人增长约8.4%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年434分波动下降至2025年405分，但该校位次与省控线关联度较低；国防科技大学位于湖南省长沙市，为本省高校，对本省考生具有天然的地缘优势；军校招生对政治面貌（中共党员或共青团员）、应届身份等有特殊要求，报考门槛高于普通高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2936名、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%导致竞争加剧、计算机/电子信息等核心专业社会热度持续高企等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约2966名，波动区间2610–3322名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（天河拔尖班）
- 理论与应用力学（航天力学拔尖班）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、网络工程、信息安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、微电子等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程、人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 航空航天类（含航空航天工程、飞行器动力工程、材料科学与工程）
- 大气科学类（含大气科学、气象技术与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2610–3322名内，建议以二档电子信息类、自动化类为主力填报，一档计算机类（含天河拔尖班）作为冲刺，三档航空航天类、大气科学类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2600名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。注意该校报考需满足应届普通高中毕业生、中共党员或共青团员等特殊条件。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 3552 → 2836 → 2730 → 2980 → 2936, fluctuating within the 2700–3600 range; rankings moved forward in 2022–2023 (increased competition) and slightly backward in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2936, stabilizing in recent years; the enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hunan was 80 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 75 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan remains 75, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a comprehensive military academy directly under the Central Military Commission, known as the 'Tsinghua of the Military', with an irreplaceable position in national defense science and technology; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings do not include military academy data, but the school's comprehensive strength is comparable to top 985 universities; as a military academy, it is not included in regular reputation monitoring or Douyin popularity ranking systems; no significant admission gaps or negative public opinion records have been observed in recent years, with application enthusiasm mainly driven by the special nature of military academies and the prospects of the national defense technology industry; disciplines such as Systems Science, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering are outstanding (fifth-round discipline evaluation data not publicly available, based on public information); enrollment majors cover core engineering directions including Computer, Electronic Information, Aerospace, and Automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors remains high (highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), Automation (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics) is moderately hot, and Aerospace majors have relatively high attention; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan is about 347,000, an increase of approximately 8.4% from about 320,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the larger candidate pool; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) fluctuated downward from 434 points in 2021 to 405 points in 2025, but the school's ranking has low correlation with the control line; the National University of Defense Technology is located in Changsha, Hunan, providing natural geographical advantages for local candidates; military academy admissions have special requirements for political status (Chinese Communist Party member or Communist Youth League member) and current student status, with higher application thresholds than regular universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2936, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, an approximately 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high social popularity of core majors like Computer and Electronic Information, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward (ranking number increases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 2966, fluctuating within the range of 2610–3322.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Tianhe Top Class)
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Aerospace Mechanics Top Class)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Network Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Category (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics, etc.)
- Automation Category (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Aerospace Category (including Aerospace Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering)
- Atmospheric Science Category (including Atmospheric Science, Meteorological Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2610–3322, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 Electronic Information and Automation categories, use Tier 1 Computer Category (including Tianhe Top Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 Aerospace and Atmospheric Science categories as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2600), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Note that applicants must meet special conditions such as being a current regular high school graduate and a Chinese Communist Party member or Communist Youth League member.

_translation.university_name_en: National University of Defense Technology of the Chinese People's Liberation Army
